name: OBS Studio
description: OBS Studio is free and open source software for video recording and live streaming. This LXC provides a lightweight VNC-accessible desktop environment with hardware encoding support (Intel QuickSync/VAAPI) for capturing USB video devices.

notes.text: Connect via VNC to port 5901. Default password: obsstudio (change with: x11vnc -storepasswd)
Run 'vainfo' inside the container to verify Intel QuickSync/VAAPI availability after restart.
If vainfo shows VAEntrypointEncSlice, select 'QuickSync H.264' as encoder in OBS Settings → Output.
For Haswell (4th gen Intel) and older: uses i965-va-driver (legacy). For Broadwell (5th gen) and newer: uses intel-media-va-driver. The framework auto-detects your GPU generation.
USB capture card (/dev/video0) and GPU (/dev/dri) are passed through from the Proxmox host. Ensure the capture card is connected before starting the container.
